cards.title: Ministry of Science & Technology
cards.description: Principal government funder supporting national priority research themes including ICT, biotech, and energy.

cards.title: University Grants Commission (UGC)
cards.description: Annual research allocation to faculty via UGC's Research and Publications Grant scheme.

cards.title: International Agencies
cards.description: UNDP, World Bank, and FAO grants targeting climate, food security, and sustainable development research.

cards.title: Industry & Private Sector
cards.description: Contract research, joint development projects, and technology transfer agreements with leading Bangladeshi corporates.
